titles.title: To amend the securities laws to prohibit brokers, dealers, and investment advisers with certain connections to the People's Republic of China from registering with the Securities and Exchange Commission, and for other purposes.

To amend the securities laws to prohibit brokers, dealers, and investment advisers with certain connections to the People's Republic of China from registering with the Securities and Exchange Commission, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
